userPincode.title: userPincode
userPincode.description: The pincode entered by the user to find nearby dealers. Use the zip code collected during lead creation or ask the user if not already collected.

vehicleDefinitionId.title: vehicleDefinitionId
vehicleDefinitionId.description: The Salesforce ID of the Vehicle Definition selected by the user. Comes from vehicleIdMap parsed in the previous step.
